# Web application

This file is read by AI coding agents that understand the `AGENTS.md` format. It is generated by EmbedIQ from an adaptive Q&A and must be kept in sync with the rest of the repository configuration.

## Rules

- Run tests before committing any change; do not skip failing tests.
- Keep changes scoped to the task — avoid drive-by refactors unless requested.
- Prefer editing existing files; do not create new files unless necessary.
- TypeScript: strict mode; explicit return types on exports; `const` by default.
